title: Phase D visual review: generated plumber site
question: Please review the AI-generated Clearflow Plumbing site and approve before we mass-produce the remaining categories. Once approved, allied-health, beauty-aesthetics, and fitness-wellness categories will be built in parallel (each grader-gated).
context:
Start the dev server if it is not already running:

  npm run dev

Then open:

  http://localhost:3000/preview/plumber          ← Generated plumber site (Clearflow Plumbing, Melbourne)
  http://localhost:3000/preview/trades           ← Hand-crafted electrician reference

What to check on the plumber site:
  - Homepage hero, services grid, testimonials, gallery, contact section
  - Service pages e.g. /preview/plumber/services/blocked-drains
  - Location pages e.g. /preview/plumber/locations/richmond  (should have rich local content, not thin)
  - Service-area pages e.g. /preview/plumber/areas/blocked-drains-richmond
  - Nav dropdowns (Services ▾ and Areas ▾) — hover to see sub-pages
  - Mobile: sticky call bar at bottom, countdown banner at top
  - FAQ at /preview/plumber/faq
  - About at /preview/plumber/about

If the quality is acceptable, reply 'approve' and we will immediately start building the three remaining categories in parallel.
